{"activeBranchId":0,"chainList":[{"description":"共鸣技能枪扫风定可使用次数增加1次。
 施放共鸣技能枪扫风定时，消耗的【破阵值】减少15点。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/37/chain_icon/1716031081704.png","name":"济世","order":1,"unlocked":true},{"description":"施放变奏技能攻其不备后，忌炎积攒30点【破阵值】，忌炎的攻击提升28%，持续15秒，每15秒可触发1次。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/37/chain_icon/1716031092977.png","name":"通变","order":2,"unlocked":true},{"description":"施放共鸣技能枪扫风定、共鸣解放苍躣八荒·谋定、共鸣解放苍躣八荒·后动或变奏技能攻其不备时，忌炎的暴击提升16%、暴击伤害提升32%，持续8秒。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/37/chain_icon/1716030801369.png","name":"观势","order":3,"unlocked":true},{"description":"施放共鸣解放苍躣八荒·谋定或共鸣解放苍躣八荒·后动时，队伍中的角色重击伤害加成提升25%，效果持续30秒。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/37/chain_icon/1716031573517.png","name":"奇正","order":4,"unlocked":true},{"description":"延奏技能克己伤害倍率增加120%。
 攻击命中目标时，忌炎的攻击提升3%，效果持续8秒，可叠加15层；施放变奏技能攻其不备后叠加至满层。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/37/chain_icon/1716031467350.png","name":"明断","order":5,"unlocked":true},{"description":"每次使用重击、变奏技能攻其不备或共鸣技能枪扫风定时，获得1层【锐意之势】，最多可叠加2层。
 施放共鸣解放苍躣八荒·后动会消耗所有【锐意之势】，每层【锐意之势】使共鸣解放苍躣八荒·后动的伤害倍率提升120%。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/37/chain_icon/1716031128113.png","name":"移山","order":6,"unlocked":true}],"equipPhantomAddPropList":[{"attributeName":"生命","attributeValue":"4560","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625484466.png"},{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"1174","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625429754.png"},{"attributeName":"防御","attributeValue":"50","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625832584.png"},{"attributeName":"暴击","attributeValue":"65.5%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625901965.png"},{"attributeName":"暴击伤害","attributeValue":"97.8%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625791807.png"},{"attributeName":"共鸣效率","attributeValue":"32.4%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625923096.png"},{"attributeName":"共鸣技能伤害加成","attributeValue":"7.9%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766626039468.png"},{"attributeName":"普攻伤害加成","attributeValue":"7.9%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625543277.png"},{"attributeName":"重击伤害加成","attributeValue":"37.5%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625563297.png"},{"attributeName":"气动伤害加成","attributeValue":"70.0%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625723554.png"}],"equipPhantomAttributeList":[{"attributeName":"生命","attributeValue":"4560","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/115/equip_phantom_attribute_icon/1766625411169.png","key":"10002-1","valid":false},{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"350","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/115/equip  技能冷却：15秒"},"quality":5,"subProps":[{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"60","key":"10007-1","valid":false},{"attributeName":"暴击","attributeValue":"10.5%","key":"8-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"11.6%","key":"10007-2","valid":true},{"attributeName":"重击伤害加成","attributeValue":"11.6%","key":"18-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"暴击伤害","attributeValue":"21%","key":"9-1","valid":true}]},{"cost":1,"fetterDetail":{"firstDescription":"气动伤害提升10%","groupId":4,"iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/88/element_group_pic/1735782965684.png","name":"啸谷长风","num":5,"secondDescription":"使用变奏技能登场时，气动伤害提升30%，持续15秒","tripleDescription":"","type":0},"level":25,"mainProps":[{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"18.0%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/66/phantom_attribute_icon_two/1766625555859.png","key":"10007-2","valid":true},{"attributeName":"生命","attributeValue":"2280","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/66/phantom_attribute_icon_two/1766625604410.png","key":"10002-1","valid":false}],"phantomProp":{"cost":1,"iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/30/phantom_icon/1716032181164.png","name":"啾啾河豚","phantomId":6000047,"phantomPropId":60000475,"quality":5,"skillDescription":"使用声骸技能，召唤啾啾河豚，鼓气并向前喷气3次，每次造成38.40%气动伤害并提供击退效果。
 技能冷却：8秒"},"quality":5,"subProps":[{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"60","key":"10007-1","valid":false},{"attributeName":"暴击","attributeValue":"10.5%","key":"8-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"暴击伤害","attributeValue":"21.0%","key":"9-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"重击伤害加成","attributeValue":"11.6%","key":"18-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"11.6%","key":"10007-2","valid":true}]},{"cost":1,"fetterDetail":{"firstDescription":"气动伤害提升10%","groupId":4,"iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/88/element_group_pic/1735782965684.png","name":"啸谷长风","num":5,"secondDescription":"使用变奏技能登场时，气动伤害提升30%，持续15秒","tripleDescription":"","type":0},"level":25,"mainProps":[{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"18.0%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/66/phantom_attribute_icon_two/1766625555859.png","key":"10007-2","valid":true},{"attributeName":"生命","attributeValue":"2280","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/66/phantom_attribute_icon_two/1766625604410.png","key":"10002-1","valid":false}],"phantomProp":{"cost":1,"iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/30/phantom_icon/1716031474369.png","name":"巡徊猎手","phantomId":390070071,"phantomPropId":60000235,"quality":5,"skillDescription":"使用声骸技能，召唤巡徊猎手向前方投掷一把飞镖，飞镖在命中敌人的时候会进行一次弹射，最多弹射3次，每次命中造成28.80%气动伤害。
 技能冷却：8秒"},"quality":5,"subProps":[{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"11.6%","key":"10007-2","valid":true},{"attributeName":"暴击","attributeValue":"10.5%","key":"8-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"60","key":"10007-1","valid":false},{"attributeName":"重击伤害加成","attributeValue":"11.6%","key":"18-1","valid":true},{"attributeName":"暴击伤害","attributeValue":"21%","key":"9-1","valid":true}]}]},"role":{"acronym":"jy","attributeId":4,"attributeName":"气动","breach":6,"chainUnlockNum":6,"isMainRole":false,"level":90,"roleIconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/27/role_icon/1716031083655.png","roleId":1404,"roleName":"忌炎","rolePicUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/27/role_pic/1766623704355.png","starLevel":5,"weaponTypeId":1,"weaponTypeName":"长刃"},"roleAttributeList":[{"attributeId":2,"attributeName":"生命","attributeValue":"15047","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625484466.png","sort":1000},{"attributeId":7,"attributeName":"攻击","attributeValue":"3066","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625429754.png","sort":2000},{"attributeId":10,"attributeName":"防御","attributeValue":"1185","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625832584.png","sort":3000},{"attributeId":8,"attributeName":"暴击","attributeValue":"87.5%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625901965.png","sort":5000},{"attributeId":9,"attributeName":"暴击伤害","attributeValue":"303%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625791807.png","sort":6000},{"attributeId":11,"attributeName":"共鸣效率","attributeValue":"100%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625923096.png","sort":7000},{"attributeId":141,"attributeName":"偏谐值累积效率","attributeValue":"100.0%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625821120.png","sort":7500},{"attributeId":18,"attributeName":"重击伤害加成","attributeValue":"58%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625563297.png","sort":10000},{"attributeId":22,"attributeName":"冷凝伤害加成","attributeValue":"24.0%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766626002604.png","sort":13000},{"attributeId":23,"attributeName":"热熔伤害加成","attributeValue":"24.0%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625261763.png","sort":14000},{"attributeId":24,"attributeName":"导电伤害加成","attributeValue":"24.0%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625358151.png","sort":15000},{"attributeId":25,"attributeName":"气动伤害加成","attributeValue":"64.0%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625723554.png","sort":16000},{"attributeId":26,"attributeName":"衍射伤害加成","attributeValue":"24.0%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766625298084.png","sort":17000},{"attributeId":27,"attributeName":"湮灭伤害加成","attributeValue":"24.0%","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/114/role_attribute_icon/1766626079657.png","sort":18000}],"roleSkin":{"isAddition":false,"picUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/90/skin_pic/1766623319181.png","priority":1,"quality":3,"qualityName":"初始服饰","roleId":1404,"skinIcon":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/90/skin_icon/1735782990504.png","skinId":81001404,"skinName":"沉沉青脊"},"skillList":[{"activeBranch":false,"level":10,"skill":{"description":"普攻
进行至多5段的连续攻击，造成气动伤害。

重击
消耗耐力进行突刺攻击，造成气动伤害。

重击·凌空击
若在重击期间按住普攻，会在重击结束后施放凌空击，造成气动伤害。

重击·潜渊斩
若在重击期间松开普攻，会在重击结束后施放潜渊斩，造成气动伤害。

空中攻击
消耗耐力进行空中下落攻击，造成气动伤害。
在下落攻击后一定时间内短按普攻，将会追击目标，造成气动伤害。

空中攻击·长空不坠
施放重击凌空击或在空中施放共鸣技能枪扫风定一定时间内，可以进行浮空攻击，造成气动伤害。

闪避反击
成功闪避后一定时间内短按普攻，将会攻击目标，造成气动伤害。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/36/role_skill_icon/1716031428826.png","id":177,"name":"孤枪止戈","skillBranches":[],"type":"常态攻击"}},{"activeBranch":false,"level":10,"skill":{"description":"向前突进一定距离，造成气动伤害。

可在空中施放。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/36/role_skill_icon/1716031412934.png","id":178,"name":"枪扫风定","skillBranches":[],"type":"共鸣技能"}},{"activeBranch":false,"level":10,"skill":{"description":"施放苍躣八荒·谋定后，忌炎进入破阵状态。

破阵状态
·忌炎的抗打断能力提升;
·普攻、重击和闪避反击替换为重击破阵之枪。

重击·破阵之枪
进行最多3段的连续攻击，造成气动伤害，此次伤害为重击伤害。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/36/role_skill_icon/1716031293796.png","id":179,"name":"苍躣八荒·谋定","skillBranches":[],"type":"共鸣解放"}},{"activeBranch":false,"level":10,"skill":{"description":"忌炎手持长枪，自空中刺向目标，造成气动伤害。","iconUrl":"https://web-static.kurobbs.com/adminConfig/36/role_skill_icon/1716031653935.png","id":182,"name":"攻其不备","skillBranches":[],"type":"变奏技能"}},{"activeBranch":false,"level":10,"skill":{"description":"施放共鸣技能枪扫风定时，若积攒30点以上【破阵值】，则消耗30点【破阵值】，此次共鸣技能枪扫风定伤害提升20%。
处于破阵状态时，共鸣技能枪扫风定伤害提升20%，且不再消耗【破阵值】。

共鸣解放·苍躣八荒·后动
施放共鸣解放苍躣八荒·谋定时，若积攒30点以上【破阵值】，则消耗30点【破阵值】，施放苍躣八荒·后动，造成气动伤害，此次伤害为重击伤害。
可在低空中施放苍躣八荒·后动。

破阵值的获取规则
【破阵值】上限60点。
常态攻击孤枪止戈命中目标时积攒【破阵值】。
变奏技能攻其不备命中目标时积攒【破阵值】。
